name: Lemon Ice Cream
recipeInstructions:
1. Whip whipping cream and set aside.
2. In a large bowl, beat egg yolks and stir in sweetened condensed milk (do not use evaporated milk), lemon juice, and food coloring if desired.
3. Fold in the whipped cream into the mixture.
4. Pour into a 9 x 5-inch loaf pan or other 2-quart container.
5. Cover, freeze for 6 hours or until firm.
6. Serve with warm Blueberry 'N' Spice Sauce.
